scripts.build:oss: MORNDRAFT_BUILD_PRESET=oss-full npm run build:profile && MORNDRAFT_BUILD_PRESET=oss-full npm run check:public-surface
scripts.build:profile: vite build && npm run check:build-profile-artifact && npm run check:build-disclosure && npm run check:static-cdn-build && npm run check:profiles && npm run check:architecture
scripts.test: node --test scripts/oss-bundle-budget.test.mjs scripts/oss-public-distribution.test.mjs scripts/oss-public-lockfile.test.mjs scripts/check-workflow-action-pins.test.mjs scripts/check-oss-distribution.test.mjs packages/core/src/code-fence-language.test.js packages/core/src/content-detection.test.js packages/core/src/document-spec.test.js packages/core/src/json-fence-content.test.js packages/core/src/markdown-lexical-edit.test.js packages/core/src/markdown-source-patch.test.js packages/core/src/morndraft-flat-adapter.test.js packages/core/src/morndraft-html-source.test.js packages/core/src/oss-capabilities.test.js packages/core/src/public-morndraft-showcase.test.js packages/core/src/public-standalone-fence.test.js packages/core/src/swiss-catalog-renderer.test.js && tsx --test components/public-workspace/PublicEditableMarkdown.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicDocument.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicDocumentTitle.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicFinalBlankLine.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicAiContext.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicAiState.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicFlatFinalEditor.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicImport.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicJsonRepair.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicLineSelection.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicMarkdownPatch.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicMermaidSecurity.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicShowcase.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicWorkspaceController.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicWorkspaceBoundary.test.ts components/public-workspace/publicDeliveryToolbar.test.ts packages/features-personal/src/ai/public-ai.test.ts packages/public-delivery/src/captureRuntime.test.ts packages/public-delivery/src/captureResourceSnapshot.test.ts packages/public-delivery/src/portableHtmlTemplate.test.ts packages/public-delivery/src/public-delivery.test.ts packages/public-delivery/src/standaloneDeadline.test.ts apps/web-oss/src/public-app-contract.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "throw new Error('MornDraft OSS is distributed as source, not as an npm package')"
